summary: Tested code pack features: PDF service v2, Creative Service Detail page with dynamic brief form, pricing sidebar with add-ons calculation, and Tasks page My Tasks/Team Overview toggle. All features working correctly.

TestCreativeServicesV2.test_submit_creative_brief_order: PASS - Order created with correct pricing

creative_service_detail_page.contact_form: PASS - Name, email, phone, company fields present
creative_service_detail_page.addons_section: PASS - Shows 3 add-ons with checkboxes and prices
creative_service_detail_page.pricing_sidebar: PASS - Shows base price, add-ons, total
creative_service_detail_page.pricing_calculation: PASS - Selecting addons updates total correctly (120k + 60k + 50k = 230k)

logo_design_page.brief_fields: PASS - All field types render correctly

tasks_page.button_styling: PASS - Selected button has gold (#D4A843) background
tasks_page.my_tasks_filter: PASS - Shows 0 tasks for admin (no tasks assigned to admin user)
tasks_page.task_cards: PASS - Task cards display with title, assignee, priority, status
tasks_page.kanban_columns: PASS - Todo, In Progress, Done, Blocked columns present

features_verified: PDF Service v2 generates quote PDFs without errors - WORKING
PDF Service v2 generates invoice PDFs without errors - WORKING
PDF has proper LOGO placeholder when no logo URL - WORKING (rounded rect with 'LOGO' text)
Creative Service Detail page (/creative-services/:slug) loads with service info - WORKING
Dynamic brief form renders text fields - WORKING
Dynamic brief form renders textarea fields - WORKING
Dynamic brief form renders select fields with options - WORKING
Dynamic brief form renders boolean/checkbox fields - WORKING
Add-ons section shows with checkboxes and prices - WORKING
Pricing sidebar calculates total with add-ons - WORKING (120k + 60k + 50k = 230k)
Tasks page has My Tasks / Team Overview toggle buttons - WORKING
My Tasks filter shows only tasks assigned to current user - WORKING (0 for admin)
Team Overview shows all tasks - WORKING (3 tasks visible)
seed_data_creation: Created test creative service orders during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All code pack features working: PDF v2 service generates clean PDFs with logo placeholder, Creative Service Detail page (/creative-services/:slug) shows dynamic brief form with all field types (text, textarea, select, boolean, multi_select), add-ons section with pricing, and pricing sidebar that calculates totals. Tasks page has working My Tasks/Team Overview toggle that filters by assigned_to field.
